power_ups.name: Luminescent Chord
power_ups.effect: Clears a cross-shaped area of tiles centered on any chosen mycelium tile, instantly removing Dream Shadows and charging the jazz_meter by 15%.
power_ups.unlock: Available after reaching Chapter 2: The Stolen Lullaby
power_ups.input: Tap power-up icon, then tap target tile on board

power_ups.name: Veil Ripper
power_ups.effect: Destroys all Obscura Veils on the board, revealing hidden tiles beneath and granting a small chance to spawn Evidence Mushrooms in their place.
power_ups.unlock: Unlock after clearing your first Obscura Veil

power_ups.name: Synesthesia Blossom
power_ups.effect: Transforms all tiles of one color into Jazz Note Spores for the next 3 turns, massively boosting rhythm scoring and jazz_meter gain.
power_ups.unlock: Rare drop from rhythm-perfect levels or jazz festival events
power_ups.input: Tap power-up icon, then select a color

power_ups.name: Obscura Echo
power_ups.effect: For the duration of a level, every 5th combo chain triggers a random narrative hint (revealing a hidden clue or suspect fragment), but also adds a minor obstacle tile to the board.
power_ups.unlock: Reward for completing a case with all clues found

power_ups.name: Jazzman's Inspiration
power_ups.effect: Refills the jazz_meter to full and makes all abilities free for the next 3 turns (costs no clue_energy/intuitions).
power_ups.unlock: Special reward from solving a mystery with perfect rhythm accuracy

upgrades.name: Sporeboard Enhancement
upgrades.improves: Office upgrades: Increases the number of intuition uses available per level and visual style of detective office.
upgrades.cost_curve: Cost in dream_fragments increases by 2 each tier (2 → 4 → 6).

upgrades.name: Jazz Meter Modulator
upgrades.improves: Jazz_meter: Each tier slows jazz_meter drain and boosts bonus effects from rhythm-perfect matches.

upgrades.name: Mycelium Relay
upgrades.improves: Tile pool: Increases the chance for Mycelium Strand (wild card) and Evidence Mushroom tiles to appear

upgrades.name: Memory Archive
upgrades.improves: Meta progression: Increases story fragment storage, unlocking extra suspect profiles and hidden jazz tracks.

synergies.combo: Synesthesia Blossom + Jazz Note Spore chains
synergies.result: All matches involving Jazz Note Spores during effect also clear adjacent obstacles and spawn bonus clue_energy pickups.
synergies.why_fun: Makes rhythm-perfect play explosive and rewarding, chaining power-ups in a satisfying jazz solo moment.

synergies.combo: Obscura Echo + Noir Insight (high combo chain)
synergies.result: Noir Insight now also reveals a hidden tile under any remaining Obscura Veil, occasionally unlocking secret story branches.
synergies.why_fun: Encourages high-skill combo play and risk/reward, with narrative surprises and rare clues as payoff.

synergies.result: Each tile uncovered by Veil Ripper has a 50% chance to be instantly transformed into an Evidence Mushroom by Spore Grow if used in the same turn.
synergies.why_fun: Promotes tactical planning, huge narrative progress bursts, and visually dramatic board clears.

sources: Rare drops from perfect rhythm streaks
sinks: Unlocking new narrative branches, suspect profiles, and décor
economy.balance_principle: Dream Fragments are capped per case to encourage replay and mastery; rare drops and event bonuses provide soft catch-up. Most upgrades scale in cost to allow new players to progress while keeping late-game challenge and scarcity. Clue_energy (secondary, session-based currency) is session-limited to prevent hoarding, while intuition is a tight, consumable resource for tactical depth.
